# Discovery Outpost Performing Arts Dance

> Dance studio offering Tap, Jazz, Ballet, and Musical Theater classes for all ages and skill levels. Where confidence meets movement.

## Pages

- [/](/): Home page with studio overview, class descriptions, weekly schedule preview, gallery, testimonials, and contact information.
- [Class Schedule](/schedule): Weekly class schedule showing days, times, and disciplines offered.
- [Register](/register): Online registration form for enrolling in dance classes or booking a trial class.
